armor.name: Vaccsuit
armor.special: Includes short-range comms, headlamp, radiation shielding. Decompresses within 1d5 rounds if punctured.

armor.name: Hazard Suit
armor.description: Environmental protection while exploring unknown planets.
armor.special: Air filter, extreme heat/cold protection, hydration reclamation (1L lasts 4 days), comms, headlamp, radiation shielding.

armor.name: Standard Battle Dress
armor.description: Lightly-plated armor worn by most marines.

armor.name: Advanced Battle Dress
armor.description: Heavy armor for marines deployed in high combat offworld engagements.
armor.special: Comms, body cam, headlamp, HUD, exoskeletal weave (Strength Checks [+]).
